sections.description: Business to Consumer - Invoice value more than 2.5 lakhs

sections.description: Credit and Debit notes for B2B and B2C

gstrReturns.subtitle: Manage GSTR-3B Returns
gstrReturns.description: Summary return of outward and inward supplies

sections.name: Outward Supplies
sections.description: Details of outward supplies and inward supplies liable to reverse charge

sections.name: ITC Claimed
sections.description: Eligible ITC - Inputs, Capital Goods, Input Services

sections.description: Values of exempt, nil-rated and non-GST inward supplies

gstrReturns.title: GSTR-9 / 9C

sections.name: Outward Supplies
sections.description: Details of outward supplies made during the financial year

sections.name: Inward Supplies
sections.description: Details of ITC availed during the financial year

sections.name: Tax Paid
sections.description: Details of tax paid as declared in returns filed during the financial year

sections.name: Reconciliation
sections.description: Particulars of the transactions for the previous FY declared in returns of April to September of current FY or up to date of filing of annual return of previous FY

sections.name: GSTR-9C
sections.description: Reconciliation of turnover declared in audited annual financial statement with turnover declared in annual return (for turnover > 5 Cr)
